Entries.Name: Narrator
Entries.Line: You've seen some zany Kweebecs in your time, but none were quite as striking as this one.

Entries.Name: Narrator
Entries.Line: The makeup covering her bark does not exist to hide, but to make a statement. What statement that is -- well, it's hard to tell at a first glance.

Entries.Name: Narrator
Entries.Line: Does she mean to intimidate? Is this an expression of her tortured soul? Or does she merely find beauty in the macabre?

Entries.Name: Narrator
Entries.Line: Whatever the case may be, she is not volunteering an answer. Instead, the black of her sunglasses peels your skin away layer by layer, just to burn holes into your very soul.

Line.Text: Her presentation stands at odds with her lack of confidence in you.

Choices.Text: [Polite conversation is for conformists. Don't say a word.]
